thesis.title: Classification of Histopathological Images for Lung Cancer Detection using Deep Convolutional Generative Adversarial Network (DCGAN) Model

relevant_projects: PGM Image Manipulation Program in C
Video Player Application using C++ and Qt

key_outcomes: Developed 10+ e-commerce web applications using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
Collaborated with UI/UX designers and backend developers to implement Figma designs and integrate RESTful APIs respectively.
Coordinated with stackholders upon design and execution.
Implemented SSR, SSG, and dynamic routing in Next.js to improve SEO and optimize content delivery.
Integrated internationalization (i18n) for multilingual support (EN/AR) and dynamic content rendering.

projects.title: DubbelDutch
projects.description: A Google Chrome extension that adds dual subtitles (Dutch + English) to platforms - NPO Start and Kijk.nl.
projects.problem: Most Dutch streaming platforms don’t offer dual subtitles, which makes it hard for beginners to follow along.
projects.solution: I built a browser extension that injects its own subtitle layer and syncs it with the video using DOM observers and timing offsets.
projects.outcome: Made it easier for learners to follow native content and practice Dutch in a more natural and passive way.
projects.challenge: Working around native video players and keeping subtitles in sync without access to internal APIs.

projects.title: AgriteQ
projects.description: A platform built for Qatar’s International Agricultural Exhibition, with a public site and an internal dashboard for managing applications and workflows.
projects.problem: Handling exhibitor applications and approvals manually was slow and messy, especially with multiple roles involved.
projects.solution: We built a centralized system with a role-based dashboard to manage applications, approvals, and analytics in one place.
projects.outcome: Helped organize workflows for 500+ exhibitors and made the approval process much smoother.
projects.challenge: Designing a multi-role dashboard where different users see different data and actions in real time.

projects.title: CineDB
projects.description: A movie browsing app using the TMDB API to explore films, trailers, and ratings.
projects.problem: Needed a project to explore frontend development and design while working with real-world data.
projects.solution: Built a responsive frontend with search, filtering, and infinite scrolling, focusing on performance and smooth UX.
projects.challenge: Handling filtering and pagination together while keeping scrolling smooth and avoiding unnecessary re-renders.

projects.title: Enterprise REST API
projects.description: A REST API built with Spring Boot for managing users and products, with a focus on structure and security.
projects.outcome: Provided a clean and consistent way to handle data and authentication across services.
projects.challenge: Implementing JWT authentication and making sure protected routes were properly secured.

projects.title: Entso-E Dashboard
projects.description: A dashboard for visualizing energy data from the ENTSO-E API using interactive charts.
projects.outcome: Made large and complex energy datasets easier to explore and understand visually.
projects.challenge: Rendering large datasets with D3 while keeping the UI responsive and smooth.

projects.title: Lung Cancer Detection
projects.description: Bachelor thesis project focused on detecting lung cancer from CT scans using deep learning. Achieved a first-class grade for the project.
projects.problem: Detecting lung cancer early from CT scans is difficult due to limited available medical image dataset.
projects.solution: Developed a Deep Convolutional Generative Adversarial Network (DCGAN) to generate additional training images and train a classification model for improved detection.
projects.outcome: Achieved 92% accuracy using the augmented dataset, demonstrating the potential of generative models in medical imaging.
projects.challenge: Handling high-resolution CT scans with limited GPU memory while ensuring the DCGAN produced realistic and useful images.

side-projects.title: Advent of Code Challenge 2025
side-projects.description: A series of coding puzzles from the Advent of Code event, designed to practice algorithmic thinking, problem-solving, and learning new programming techniques in JavaScript.

side-projects.title: Flip Card Component - Animate UI
side-projects.description: A reusable React component that flips smoothly to reveal content on the back side, adding interactive animations to web interfaces and enhancing user experience with motion and Tailwind CSS.

side-projects.title: 1 Billion Rows Challenge (Java)
side-projects.description: An experiment in high-performance Java data processing, focused on efficiently parsing and aggregating massive weather datasets using streams, hash maps, and multithreading techniques.
